meaning: n.蒲式耳(容量等于八加仑)v.修补
examples: Grains are sold by the bushel.
A handful of common sense is worth bushel of learning.
I'll give him a bushel of corn, said one.and I will, said another.
Kinmonth was always perfectly happy to hide his light under the bushel of others.
Last year, for example, he produced 35 bushels per acre, far below the 150 bushel goal.
